description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git image with a docker:dind service and logs in to registry.gitlab.com using the CI_JOB_TOKEN in a global before_script. Define variables CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE and CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE as registry paths with the commit ref name and latest tag. Add a build job in the build stage that runs docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE . and docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. Add a test job in the test stage that runs docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, then docker run $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE ssh -V, docker run $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE git --version, and docker run $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE git ftp --version. Add a release-image job in the release stage that only runs on the master branch and executes docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, docker tag $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE.
